title: Hunter's Song
content:
Not a stone from my black sling
    Ever misses anything,
    But the arrows of your eye
    Surer shoot and faster fly.

    Not one creature that I hit
    Lingers on to know of it,
    But the game that falls to love
    Lives and lingers long enough.

    From the Turkic.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "Hunter's Song"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
